headline: Dollar Tree Stock Surges After Earnings. The Retailer Has a Big New Delivery Partner.
summary: The company posted adjusted earnings of $1.74 a share for its fiscal first quarter, up from $1.26 last year and above analysts’ consensus estimate of $1.53, according to FactSet.  Earlier Thursday, delivery platform  DoorDash  announced a partnership with  Dollar Tree  to offer on-demand delivery from the retailer’s U.S. stores.

Earlier Thursday, delivery platform  DoorDash  announced a partnership with  Dollar Tree  to offer on-demand delivery from the retailer’s U.S. stores.

headline: Swift Ride Eliminates Fleet Theft and Saves Over $400k Annually with Geotab
summary: Geotab, today announced that Swift Ride, a subscription-based vehicle rental company serving gig economy workers, has achieved remarkable results using Geotab's connected vehicle technology, including eliminating vehicle theft entirely and saving over $400,000 annually.

headline: Gary Vaynerchuk and District Announce Strategic Partnership
summary: LOS ANGELES, May 28, 2026--Gary Vaynerchuk, serial entrepreneur, investor, and digital marketing pioneer, and District, an AI commerce platform, today announced a strategic partnership to advance the future of online commerce. As part of the partnership, Vaynerchuk will serve as an advisor to District, bringing his conviction in community-driven commerce and his expertise in live selling, brand building and digital culture to the company.

raw.headline: Gary Vaynerchuk and District Announce Strategic Partnership
raw.summary: LOS ANGELES, May 28, 2026--Gary Vaynerchuk, serial entrepreneur, investor, and digital marketing pioneer, and District, an AI commerce platform, today announced a strategic partnership to advance the future of online commerce. As part of the partnership, Vaynerchuk will serve as an advisor to District, bringing his conviction in community-driven commerce and his expertise in live selling, brand building and digital culture to the company.

headline: Boston Seizes on California Billionaire Tax to Lure AI Talent
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The talent at some of America’s hottest artificial intelligence companies often passes through Boston-area universities before heading west to build billion-dollar businesses in Silicon Valley.
